column1: Nico Hoerner leads the hit parade today, setting the tone from the top of the Cubs order at home with a steady bat and a strong 70.7% chance to reach safely—backed by a favorable matchup against Jesus Luzardo and the platoon edge. Brice Turang isn’t far behind, also batting leadoff and flashing a reliable profile on the road with a favorable park and lefty-on-righty advantage against Keider Montero. Xavier Edwards and Alec Burleson round out the list, both boasting top-of-order roles and solid platoon spots, making them intriguing options for those looking to keep their streaks alive.
